description_long: This object is a dagger with a straight, double-edged blade made of dark, metallic material. The blade is slender and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for piercing. The handle is cylindrical, slightly contoured, and appears to be made of dark wood, providing a comfortable grip. A simple crossguard separates the blade from the handle, offering basic hand protection. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or engravings. The finish of the blade is smooth and slightly glossy, while the handle has a matte, natural wood texture.
description: A straight, double-edged dagger with a dark metal blade, wooden handle, and simple crossguard. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: The dagger is seen from the tip, showing the narrow, pointed blade and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_1: Side profile reveals the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, the cylindrical wooden handle, and the crossguard.
description_view_2: Viewed from above, the slimness of the blade and the oval shape of the handle are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with the same features of blade, handle, and crossguard.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, contoured, dark wood, smooth finish, rounded pommel
